name: Base VS Code Server
description: Build a dev container from the local DOD base image with a pinned VS Code Server payload baked in.

baseImage.description: Base image to extend. Build scripts produce devcontainers/base-dod:0.1.0 by default.

vscodeCommit.description: VS Code commit ID whose server archive should be baked into the image.

vscodeQuality.description: VS Code update channel used to fetch the server archive.
